## 💡 Do you have an awesome idea?
You can comment here, ***How?***

You can describe the idea like:
**My idea is** -> to make an extension for the tool Search User 👤
**How to do it?** -> to be more precise and make searches with multiple usernames!

***I'm all ears here!***
